exercises.title: Simulate a Partition
exercises.description: Block traffic between two local processes and observe how the system reacts.
exercises.command: tc qdisc add dev lo root netem loss 100%
exercises.expected_outcome: Requests fail and you can observe partition behavior.

exercises.title: Trace a Leader Election
exercises.description: Run a tiny cluster and watch which node becomes leader after a restart.
exercises.expected_outcome: One node is elected leader and another takes over on failure.

exercises.title: Build a Consistent Hash Ring
exercises.description: Map keys to nodes and show how few keys move when a node is added or removed.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can quantify key movement across membership changes.

exercises.title: Implement an Optimistic Counter
exercises.description: Use WATCH/MULTI/EXEC or compare-and-swap semantics to increment safely under contention.
exercises.expected_outcome: Concurrent increments do not overwrite each other.

exercises.title: Build a Leader Election Prototype
exercises.description: Implement election timeouts, heartbeats, and failover for a small cluster.
exercises.expected_outcome: A new leader appears after the old one is stopped.

exercises.title: Design a Fault-Tolerant Task Queue
exercises.description: Create a queue that retries failures, dedupes work, and survives worker crashes.
exercises.expected_outcome: You have an end-to-end design for retries, state, and failure handling.
